pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Framework version to 6.x to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring 5.x does not support Java 21 and uses the deprecated javax.* namespace, causing runtime failures or incompatibility with Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Align spring-test dependency version with the new Spring Framework version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mismatched Spring versions between core and test modules cause ClassDefNotFound or linkage errors at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Mockito versions (1.x) rely on internal JDK APIs removed or restricted in Java 21, causing runtime Instrumentation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet for Jakarta EE 10 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Spring 6.x require Jakarta EE 10 (jakarta.* namespace); using javax.* causes compile errors or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not correctly handle Java 21 language features or module system changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch compiler configuration from source/target to release flag for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to compile for a specific JDK version in modern Maven, ensuring correct boot classpath and API usage for Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 dependency as it is likely replaced by JUnit 5 (Jupiter) in the Spring 6/Boot 3 ecosystem.

src/main/java/com/rst/helloworld/service.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Framework utility method with its modern replacement.
src/main/java/com/rst/helloworld/service.why_exists: StringUtils.isEmpty(String) is deprecated in Spring Framework 6 (required by Spring Boot 3) and may be removed in future versions, causing compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on configuration.

src/main/java/com/rst/helloworld/web/Wel.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor as Spring Boot 3.x enforces constructor-based injection by default.
Replace verbose @RequestMapping with specific @GetMapping annotation for cleaner code.
Replace verbose @RequestMapping with specific @GetMapping annotation for cleaner code.
Remove unused import for RequestMethod enum.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Migrate web.xml namespace and schema from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) and update version to 6.0.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; using old Java EE namespaces causes deployment failures or classloading errors due to missing javax.servlet packages.
